name: Biological / Organic
description: A craft that reads as living rather than built — origami folds, tendril appendages, single sensor-eye, fabric-like surface. Jean Jacket from Jordan Peele's Nope (2022) is the cinematic canonical form: a classic saucer at rest, unfolding into a radially symmetric angel/jellyfish when active, with a square camera-eye and green lash tendrils. Related to but distinct from the jellyfish_uap type. The biological class upends the vehicle mental model entirely.

ir_signature.ir_notes: Cinematic archetype. The origami-fold unfolding reveal (4–6 second elastic fold hierarchy) is the defining animation. Cloud-hiding behavior: uses cumulus as cover.

cultural_context: Jordan Peele's Nope (2022) — Jean Jacket is 'an apex predator that evolved to mimic a saucer.' The square camera-eye stares directly at the viewer. The green lash tendrils echo alien abduction imagery and also (given the #39FF14 green) the little_green_men palette — intentional cross-repo resonance. Note: the biological_organic emissive_hex is deliberately set to the little_green_men canonical green.
